rationale: Gov't Code §1201.002 merely defines 'issuer,' 'public security,' and 'public security authorization' for bond issuance purposes. It has no operative relationship to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote:
"Issuer" means:
(A) an agency, authority, board, body politic, department, district, instrumentality, municipal corporation, political subdivision, public corporation, or subdivision of this state; or
(B) a nonprofit corporation acting for or on behalf of an entity described by Paragraph (A).
_note: No conflict found; rule text concerns public security definitions unrelated to homestead exemption.
